scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:railway: NODE_ENV=production BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/vishal-info-cyber run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node -e "const{cpSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');mkdirSync('artifacts/api-server/dist/public',{recursive:true});cpSync('artifacts/vishal-info-cyber/dist/public','artifacts/api-server/dist/public',{recursive:true});console.log('Frontend copied to Express dist/public');"
